name: testgold
description: Framework-agnostic golden fixture manager for deterministic CLI and library tests.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js compare --actual fixtures/text/actual.txt --golden fixtures/text/expected.txt --config fixtures/testgold.config.json --summary-json
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
